args: console.log('success adapter start'); console.log(process.argv[1]); setTimeout(() => { console.log('success adapter done'); process.exit(0); }, 50);
description: Deterministic smoke adapter that always succeeds after echoing the prompt.

args: console.error('failure adapter start'); console.error(process.argv[1]); setTimeout(() => { console.error('failure adapter done'); process.exit(7); }, 50);
description: Deterministic smoke adapter that always exits with a non-zero code.

args: console.log('long run adapter start'); console.log(process.argv[1]); let tick = 0; const timer = setInterval(() => { tick += 1; console.log(`tick:${tick}`); }, 200); const shutdown = (signal) => { clearInterval(timer); console.log(`shutdown:${signal}`); process.exit(0); }; process.on('SIGTERM', () => shutdown('SIGTERM')); process.on('SIGINT', () => shutdown('SIGINT'));
description: Deterministic smoke adapter that keeps running until cancelled or timed out.
